title: Create well Optimised
description: A pretty optimised modpack containing create and some other niche mods.
body:
**A fun small modpack that is able to run on less the 6gb of ram. Well optimised and containes some other niche mods.  
The goal with this modpack is to make a mix between industry and magic without the cost of performance. It is also a great modpack to play with a small group of friends or alone.**  
This is my first ever published modpack, so feedback is nice. You can give me suggestions on my email **"ohioemail7@gmail.com"**

**Keep in mind that I cannot make regular updates or add all suggested mods for the purpose of balance. If enough people download this modpack, I may release other ones.**
